name: Twinkies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix, pudding, water, oil, and eggs in a bowl.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Bake the mixture in a 9x15 inch pan for 35 minutes until set.
4. Heat 1 cup of milk and flour separately; let it cool.
5. Beat the remaining ingredients together until fluffy, then add the cooled milk mix.
6. Remove the cake from the pan when it is completely cool.
7. Cut the cake lengthwise and place half on a serving plate for the bottom layer.
8. Spread filling evenly over the first layer.
9. Place the second half of the cake on top to complete the "Twinkie" shape.
10. Cut into individual servings.
